title: Same-compound field comparison
summary: Compare each car only to same-lap peers on the same tyre compound.
rationale: Same-compound context is more strategy-cohort specific than whole-field context. Lower-scoring attempts suggest this may be weaker alone, but it remains a focused complementary feature block.
implementation_hint: Group by race-year/race, lap, and normalized `Compound`; add within-group ranks and median deltas for `TyreLife`, `LapTime_Delta`, `Cumulative_Degradation`, and `Position`. Include safe defaults for small groups.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with low-medium confidence.
risk: Sparse compound groups can be noisy, and previous attempts were not consistently strong; use only a few stable features.
